example: You need to verify your membership before you can borrow books.

Please return all checked-out items to the library on time.
Visitors are asked not to disturb wildlife in the park.

All students should help maintain cleanliness in the cafeteria.

Please return trays to the rack after finishing your meal.

You are forbidden to enter the laboratory without permission.
Citizens are obligated to pay taxes according to the law.
All freshmen are required to live in dormitories.

Students are recommended to take at least one science course.
